auth.signInDesc: Sign in to create sessions, join games, and track your rankings.
auth.signUpDesc: Create an account to get started.
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.terms: By signing in you agree to SuperFans terms.

home.heroDesc: The gamification layer for padel venues. XP, leaderboards, fan support — zero app downloads.
home.playerDesc: Join sessions, earn XP, climb divisions, get fan support
home.venueDesc: Free setup. Branded URL. Live leaderboards. Monthly prizes.
home.hostDesc: Create sessions, manage players, auto-generate matches

venue.monthlyReset: Resets monthly · Top 3 win prize pool
venue.noPlayers: No players yet — join a session to appear here!
venue.rankingsLive: Rankings update live when matches are approved by staff

donation.title: Support {{name}}
donation.chooseAmount: Choose an amount to show your support
donation.signInRequired: Please sign in to support this player

hostDashboard.createFirst: Create your first session. Admin will review and approve it before you can invite players.
hostDashboard.waitingApproval: ⏳ Waiting for admin to approve this session.
hostDashboard.cantShareYet: You cannot share the invite link yet.

newSession.title: NEW SESSION
newSession.formatDesc: How players are paired each round
newSession.americanoDesc: Partners rotate every round. Everyone plays with and against all others.
newSession.mexicanoDesc: Re-ranked after each round. Winners face winners, losers face losers.
newSession.singleDesc: Players join alone. App pairs them randomly each round.
newSession.fixedDesc: Players register as a pair and play together throughout.
newSession.waitingStaff: Your session is now waiting for staff to approve it.
newSession.approvedLink: Once approved, you'll get your shareable invite link.

admin.needApproval: 🛡️ Sessions need approval before hosts can share invite links.
admin.scoreApprovalInfo: ⚽ Approve match scores → XP credited → Leaderboard refreshes live.

onboarding.playerRoleDesc: Join sessions, earn XP, climb the leaderboard
onboarding.venueRoleDesc: Register your venue and attract players
